title: Adeneleuterophora poiformis
taxonomy: Adeneleuterophora poiformis is a species of fungus in the genus Adeneleuterophora. It belongs to the family Leocarpaceae and is a type of lichenicolous fungus. This fungus is known to be a parasite of lichens, specifically forming a parasitic relationship with certain species. Adeneleuterophora poiformis is classified under the kingdom Fungi and is a unique example of a lichenicolous fungus. Its classification is significant in understanding the complex relationships between fungi and their hosts.
